name: browser-automation-skill
description: Drive real browsers from OpenAI Codex through a bundled MCP server and Codex skill.

interface.longDescription: Browser Automation Skill gives Codex a local MCP server for browser navigation, snapshots, clicks, form filling, extraction, site profiles, sessions, credentials, captures, and telemetry. Browser state stays local under ~/.browser-skill/.
defaultPrompt: Use Browser Automation Skill to open my app and inspect the login page.
Use Browser Automation Skill to snapshot the current site and click a visible control.
